channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-21T00:13Z — 755 outages, 13,559 customers, 434 fair-weather, 8 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NY-NGRID: 1418 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 1162 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NC-DEP: 570 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | GA-GPC: 247 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
